title: WebhookNotificationConfig
description: Configuration for a webhook notification integration in Dynatrace. Posted to POST /api/config/v1/notifications to register the webhook.

type.description: The notification type. Must be WEBHOOK for webhook integrations.

name.description: A display name for this notification configuration.

active.description: Whether this notification integration is active.

url.description: The HTTPS URL of the webhook endpoint that will receive problem notifications.

alertingProfile.description: The ID of the alerting profile (problem filter) that controls which problems trigger this notification.

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include in the webhook request, such as authorization headers or content-type overrides.

acceptAnyCertificate.description: Whether to accept any TLS certificate from the webhook endpoint. Should be false in production environments.

payload.description: The custom payload template using Dynatrace placeholder variables such as {ProblemID}, {ProblemTitle}, {State}. If not specified, Dynatrace uses the default JSON payload format.
